name: Sd - N (YANDERE USER)
description:
Hello, lovely people.This is really my first time making a bot I decided to recreate one of my old bots from me different website. So I really hope you guys enjoyed this. And I'll give you a heads up on the story. It may not be cannon, but I hope you would like it also I am very sorry if the bot does anything wrong and if you need anything to be fixed, please leave it down in the comments.Also I got this image from a tiktok artist

UPDATE:added a make your own scenario so if you didn't like the setth story, you can just make anything you want

You always loved N since he came to this exact score, he quickly became friends with Uzi,V,Thad,And Lizzy (also J) and for former, for you, you will never like to talk to others.No, you prefer to watch a voice from a clear distance
creator: Ayadn
